---
title: "Page 5 - Case Study"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02-sp05"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Case context

_Provide the background to the case, including the setting, key people involved, or the initial situation._

---

## The challenge

_Describe the main issue, question, or problem that emerged in this case._

---

## Response or decision

_Detail the actions taken, options considered, or specific decisions made in response to the challenge._

---

## Outcome

_Explain what happened as a result, including any consequences, results, or lessons learned._

---

## Reflect on the case

_Add a prompt for the learner to interpret, critique, or extend the thinking around this specific case._

---



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction if appropriate for this scenario response task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.scenario-response}
**Scenario Challenge**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe a realistic or authentic scenario corresponding to the learning objectives._]

**What would you do?**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Ask the learner to respond or take action in this scenario._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Guidance and Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for different responses._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief wrap-up or next-step prompt after the scenario._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add framing for this comparison or multi-perspective view here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Perspective A
<!-- editable:start tab_1_content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add content for the first perspective or approach here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

## Perspective B
<!-- editable:start tab_2_content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add content for the second perspective or approach here._]
<!-- editable:end -->


:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a prompt for the learner to compare these views or decide which applies to their context._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 4 - Methods Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp06.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 6 - Discussion Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
